name: @vaqif14/prompt-builder
description: Skill-discovery prompt builder for coding agents. Turns vague tasks into expert prompt text that searches local and ecosystem skills, recommends install/load steps, and tells the next agent which specialist skills to invoke and what evidence to collect. Optimized for Claude Code and its skills ecosystem.

scripts.verify: npm run validate:data && npm test && npm run eval
scripts.test: node tests/data-loader.test.js && node tests/contracts.test.js && node tests/agent-cards.test.js && node tests/skill-trust.test.js && node tests/session-store.test.js && node tests/cli.test.js && node tests/solution-flow.test.js && node tests/platform-detector.test.js && node tests/mode-router.test.js && node tests/skill-matcher.test.js && node tests/sanitize.test.js && node tests/codebase-grounding.test.js && node tests/end-to-end.test.js && node tests/stack-cache.test.js && node tests/error-handler.test.js && node tests/token-budget.test.js && node tests/roadmap-data.test.js && node tests/workflow-router.test.js && node tests/context-diet.test.js && node tests/install-profiles.test.js && node tests/quality-rubric.test.js && node tests/skill-discovery.test.js && node tests/skill-suggestions.test.js && node tests/eval-harness.test.js && node tests/title.test.js && node tests/title-integration.test.js

author: Vaqif Gulmammadov <vaqif14@gmail.com>
